name: Amaranth Date Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped dates and amaranth with boiling water.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs well.
3. Add honey and melted butter to the beaten eggs and mix thoroughly.
4. Gradually stir in all remaining ingredients into the egg mixture, ensuring everything is well combined.
5. Pour the batter into an oiled loaf pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
